description: Synthetic RAG evaluation over product-support, billing, and security notes.

mock_responses.refund-window: Refunds are available for damaged items within 30 days according to [support-policy].
mock_responses.enterprise-sso: Enterprise plans support SAML SSO and audit logs according to [security-notes].
mock_responses.billing-owner: Billing owner changes require an admin request and finance confirmation in [billing-guide].
mock_responses.data-retention: Default retention is 90 days, with shorter retention available for enterprise workspaces in [security-notes].
mock_responses.downgrade-risk: Downgrading removes enterprise controls but keeps exported reports available from [billing-guide].
mock_responses.damaged-item: The support team should collect the order id, confirm damage, and start the refund workflow from [support-policy].
mock_responses.invoice-delay: Invoice delays should be escalated to finance after checking billing owner details in [billing-guide].
mock_responses.audit-log: Audit logs are available on enterprise plans and help review workspace access in [security-notes].
mock_responses.trial-limits: Trial workspaces include limited seats and do not include SAML SSO according to [billing-guide].
mock_responses.support-escalation: Escalate policy exceptions with order id, reason, and context from [support-policy].

documents.text: Support agents should collect an order id for damaged items, confirm the refund window, and escalate policy exceptions. Refunds are normally available within 30 days.
Billing owner changes require an admin request and finance confirmation. Trial workspaces have limited seats. Downgrades remove enterprise controls but exported reports remain available.
Enterprise plans support SAML SSO, workspace audit logs, and configurable retention. Default retention is 90 days, and shorter retention is available for enterprise workspaces.

questions.question: How long is the normal refund window for damaged items?
What is required to change the billing owner?
What is the default data retention period?
What happens when an account downgrades?
What should support collect for a damaged item refund?
When should an invoice delay be escalated?
What limitations apply to trial workspaces?
What details are needed for policy exception escalation?
